objects.name: Analytic 1772
objects.description: A defender observes an application holding microphone capture capability transitioning into active microphone resource usage through Android audio APIs (e.g., MediaRecorder or AudioRecord), followed by sustained capture while the application is backgrounded or the device is locked, and subsequent outbound network traffic suggesting potential audio exfiltration or streaming.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Invocation of MediaRecorder.start(), AudioRecord.startRecording(), or VOICE_CALL audio source

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Microphone sensor activation or audio recording session initiated by application process

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application transitions to background or executes while screen locked during microphone session

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:MDMLog
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application granted or retaining RECORD_AUDIO permission or privileged CAPTURE_AUDIO_OUTPUT capability

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: MobileEDR:telemetry
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Application writes audio buffer or recorded audio file into application storage directories

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Minimum microphone session duration before triggering detection to reduce noise from short legitimate captures.
Environment-specific baseline for legitimate background microphone usage
Time window correlating microphone activation with outbound network traffic.
